creator: oberman@es.net
text:
I notice that the gkrellm, when built from the port, does not link
with libcipher, resulting in several warnings.

I re-linked the executable with -lcipher and it worked fine. Is there
a reason libcipher is not included on the final cc?

Fix: The following patch will fix the problem:
How-To-Repeat: 	Make the port
